overview: The Man Clinic provides testosterone replacement therapy, growth hormone stimulation, and GLP-1 weight loss solutions delivered by a physician specializing in anti-aging medicine. Patients receive care in a casual setting with in-house lab testing and quick visits.
highlights: In-house lab with testosterone results within 20 minutes
No appointment necessary for follow-up testosterone injections
Multiple office locations in the Los Angeles area (Woodland Hills, Culver City, Redondo Beach)
targetAudience: Men over age 30 experiencing low testosterone and age-related hormonal decline.
